headline: Is HP (HPQ) Offering Value After Its Recent Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether HP's current share price offers value or just more volatility, starting with a clear view of what you are paying for each dollar of its business can help frame the decision. At a last close of US$19.76, the stock has seen a 0.9% move over the past week and 1.6% over the past month, set against a year to date return of a 10.7% decline and a 1 year return of an 18.2% decline. These price moves sit alongside ongoing attention on HP's positioning in the PC and...
